highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 1.53.2 ships preview builds of the GPU backend and the SVG module alongside the 1.53 servicing line.

preview_summaries.1.53.2-gpu2: The second GPU preview, refining the GPU-backed rendering pipeline from the first GPU build.
preview_summaries.1.53.2-svg1: The first SVG preview, adding the experimental SVG surface for authoring SVG documents from SkiaSharp.
preview_summaries.1.53.2-gpu1: The first GPU preview, introducing GPU-backed rendering on the 1.53.2 line.
